title: China-to-Angola Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for Angola PV Inverter Project Submissions
rows.target_requirement: No Angola-only EMC regulation specific to solar PV inverters has been identified in public official sources for this draft. In practice, EMC is usually handled through IANORQ standards/conformity review, utility or EPC technical schedules, and IEC-referenced project specifications. The relevant inverter EMC evidence commonly requested is IEC 62920 for photovoltaic power conversion equipment and IEC 61000-series emissions/immunity evidence, including harmonic-current evidence where applicable. For grid-tied Angola projects, EMC evidence should be tied to the exact inverter model, rating, firmware, filter configuration, and operating voltage used in the project.
target_standards: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility emissions, immunity, and harmonic-current test methods as specified by the project
IANORQ conformity / standards review where applicable to imported electrical equipment
EPC or lender technical specifications for Angola solar PV projects
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence commonly comes from GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, domestic CNAS laboratory reports, CQC/CGC certification, and China project acceptance records. These can be useful for background technical review but should not be presented as automatically equivalent to IEC 62920 or project-specified IEC 61000 reports. Angola project reviewers may require test reports from an internationally recognized or ILAC-accredited laboratory, English or Portuguese certificate language, and clear model-family coverage.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: China-only EMC reports do not prove Angola acceptance unless the importer, IANORQ pathway, utility reviewer, EPC, and lender accept them in writing. Exporters should obtain or map IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 reports for the exact inverter configuration, including harmonic-current evidence, conducted and radiated emissions, immunity, surge, EFT, and electrostatic discharge where the project specification requires them. Translate certificate summaries and test scope into Portuguese for Angola review.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by IANORQ conformity/import review, ENDE/RNT technical review, EPC project specification, lender procurement condition, or owner engineer
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-driven in China depending on certification route; China reports are not automatically valid for Angola IEC-referenced submissions

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 EMC evidence alone for Angola. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 evidence for the specific inverter model and configuration, with Portuguese-ready summaries, and confirm in writing whether IANORQ, ENDE/RNT, the EPC contractor, and any lender will accept the report package before shipment.

rows.requirement: Angola Grid-Connection Route — IRSEA Licensing, ENDE / RNT Interface Review, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V Settings
rows.target_requirement: Grid-tied PV inverter use in Angola should be treated as a project approval matter, not only a product certificate matter. IRSEA is the regulator for electricity and water services; ENDE is the distribution utility; RNT and PRODEL commonly appear in transmission and generation project interfaces. For distribution-connected systems, the practical gate is ENDE technical review plus any IRSEA licensing or authorization applicable to the project owner or operator. For utility-scale or donor/EPC-financed projects, the technical specification normally references IEC inverter evidence such as IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 photovoltaic utility interface requirements, and project-specific protection settings. Angola's low-voltage grid context is commonly 50 Hz, 220/380 V, so inverter firmware, protection thresholds, reconnection delay, and anti-islanding settings should be validated for Angola project parameters rather than assumed from China factory defaults.
target_standards: IRSEA electricity-sector regulation and licensing role for Angola power services
ENDE distribution-grid technical connection review for distribution-connected projects
RNT / PRODEL interface requirements for transmission-connected or generation projects
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Angola LV grid context commonly treated as 50 Hz, 220/380 V
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for photovoltaic power station connection to the power system, NB/T 32004 inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are built around Chinese grid procedures and Chinese project acceptance. They do not by themselves establish IRSEA licensing compliance, ENDE connection acceptance, RNT interface approval, or lender/EPC acceptance in Angola.
china_standards: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: China domestic grid evidence does not transfer automatically to Angola. Exporters should prepare a project-specific Angola grid package: IEC 62116 anti-islanding report, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, inverter parameter sheet for 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V operation, Portuguese-language installation and commissioning instructions, protection setting file, and a statement showing whether firmware differs from the China factory configuration. Submit the package through the Angola project developer, EPC contractor, licensed installer, or utility interface responsible for ENDE/RNT review.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-tied projects where IRSEA authorization, ENDE distribution connection, RNT transmission interface, or project-owner technical approval applies
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China project procedures but does not transfer to Angola IRSEA / ENDE / RNT acceptance

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Angola grid connection as a project-specific regulatory and utility review. China GB/T 19964, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 37408 evidence is not a substitute for IRSEA licensing, ENDE/RNT interface review, IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, and Angola-specific firmware settings. Confirm the current Portuguese-language submission path with IRSEA, ENDE, the project EPC, or the appointed owner engineer before shipment.

source.publisher: IRSEA (Instituto Regulador dos Serviços de Electricidade e de Águas)

rows.requirement: Angola Solar Market Context — EPC / Lender Technical Specifications for Utility and Rural Electrification PV
rows.target_requirement: Angola is an oil-dependent economy diversifying its power mix through large solar and rural electrification programmes, including Biópio, Baía Farta, and provincial PV projects developed through EPC and donor/lender-backed structures. In practice, inverter acceptance for these projects is often governed by the employer's requirements, EPC specification, owner engineer comments, lender procurement rules, and IEC-referenced technical schedules, in addition to Angolan regulatory and utility review. Documentation is commonly expected in Portuguese or with controlled Portuguese translations.
target_standards: Angola Ministry of Energy and Water renewable-energy and electrification project context
Project EPC / employer's requirements for utility-scale PV and provincial solar projects
IEC-referenced inverter safety, grid, EMC, and performance schedules in financed project specifications
rows.china_equivalent: China domestic project references, factory type-test reports, CQC/CGC certificates, and GB/T or NB/T grid certificates can help establish manufacturer capability but are not normally enough for Angola-financed EPC submissions. Owner engineers and lenders may require direct IEC reports, English or Portuguese certificates, serial-number traceability, factory audit records, warranty terms, spare-parts commitments, cybersecurity or monitoring-system documentation, and project-specific parameter files.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
rows.gap: Gap: For Angola EPC and financed projects, supplier qualification is broader than standards equivalence. Build a submittal matrix that maps every inverter certificate and test report to the employer's requirements, including IEC 62109-1/-2, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, IEC 62920 or IEC 61000 EMC evidence, environmental ratings, monitoring protocol, warranty, spare parts, Portuguese-language manuals, and Angola firmware settings. Obtain written acceptance from the EPC or owner engineer before shipment.

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but mandatory in practice where the procurement contract, lender conditions, EPC specification, or owner engineer requires IEC-referenced inverter evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese domestic certificates are supporting evidence only and do not create acceptance under Angola project procurement rules

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Angola solar procurement often turns on EPC, owner-engineer, and lender acceptance, not only statutory product conformity. Do not assume a China GB/T or NB/T inverter certificate will satisfy the project schedule. Prepare an IEC-referenced, Portuguese-ready submittal package and obtain written acceptance from the Angola project chain before manufacturing, shipping, or configuring firmware.

source.publisher: MINEA (Ministry of Energy and Water, Angola)

rows.requirement: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — IANORQ Conformity and Angola Project Acceptance
rows.target_requirement: IANORQ is Angola's standards and quality body and is the primary standards/conformity reference point for imported regulated products. For PV inverters, the practical safety baseline in Angola projects is IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence, because these are the internationally recognized safety standards for power converters used in photovoltaic systems. Large Angola PV projects and rural electrification procurements may also require IEC safety evidence directly in EPC or lender specifications. Safety evidence should cover the exact model or model family, DC voltage class, AC output configuration, enclosure rating, thermal limits, protective earthing, isolation, and firmware or hardware variants supplied to Angola.
target_standards: IANORQ standards and conformity role for Angola
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
EPC / lender project specifications for Angola utility-scale and rural electrification PV projects
rows.china_equivalent: China-side PV inverter safety evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, CQC/CGC voluntary certificates, and CNAS laboratory reports. These documents may demonstrate domestic testing maturity but are not a substitute for IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates unless the Angola conformity route, project owner, and EPC/lender reviewer explicitly accept the mapping. China reports should be checked for model-family coverage, component critical list, insulation system, environmental rating, and whether the tested configuration matches the Angola bill of materials.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: A China-only safety certificate does not close the Angola safety acceptance gate. Exporters should prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates, test reports, critical component lists, rating labels, installation manual, Portuguese-language safety warnings, declaration of conformity or manufacturer declaration requested by the importer, and traceability from certificate model numbers to shipped model numbers. Where IANORQ or an Angola project reviewer accepts an IEC CB route, keep the CB certificate, CB test report, national deviations review if any, and factory inspection evidence together.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by IANORQ conformity/import review, project technical specification, EPC submittal review, lender procurement condition, or owner engineer
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-driven in China; China domestic certificates do not automatically satisfy Angola IEC 62109 evidence expectations

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] A PV inverter supported only by China GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety evidence should not be treated as ready for Angola. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates and reports, Portuguese-language safety documentation, and model traceability, then confirm the accepted conformity route with IANORQ, the importer, the EPC contractor, or the owner engineer before shipment.

source.publisher: IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalização e Qualidade)
